analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class feature presentation. The feature defines the choice of the martial archetype subclass at level 3 and outlines when subsequent archetype features are gained (3rd, 7th, 10th, 15th, 18th).
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, references the relevant section ('archetype'), and explicitly states the level progression for archetype features.
analysis.mechanics: This feature is a structural placeholder that dictates the start of subclass progression. It has no immediate mechanical effect other than triggering the selection of a specific Martial Archetype (subclass) for the Fighter class, which grants the level 3 features.

data_review.action_required: None. Data appears accurate and complete for this structural feature.
